summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HevaPOS advanced order and payment features: (1) Order notes for kitchen, (2) Discounts/Coupons (percentage and fixed), and (3) Split payment methods (cash + card). All 12 new backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12 new tests passed, 64 total passed, 1 failed due to test data conflict)

seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 advanced order/payment features working correctly: 1) Order notes stored and returned in API, 2) Percentage and fixed discounts calculated correctly with cap at subtotal, 3) Split payment with cash+card validation working. Frontend UI panels for discount/notes/split payment all functional.

backend_tests.failed_reason: test_create_table failed due to Table 99 already existing from previous test runs (test data conflict, not a bug)

discount_panel.percentage_fixed_toggle: PASSED - Percentage and Fixed buttons visible
discount_panel.apply_clear_buttons: PASSED - Apply and Clear buttons functional

notes_panel.done_clear_buttons: PASSED - Done and Clear buttons functional
notes_panel.checkmark_indicator: PASSED - Shows ✓ when notes are entered

split_payment_mode.validation_color: PASSED - Green when amounts match, red when they don't
split_payment_mode.complete_split_payment_button: PASSED - data-testid='complete-split-payment' enabled when amounts match

order_creation_with_discount_notes.order_placed: PASSED - Order #065 created with discount and notes
order_creation_with_discount_notes.kitchen_receipt_generated: PASSED - ESC/POS commands generated for kitchen

features_verified.order_notes_for_kitchen: WORKING - Notes stored in order_notes field and returned in API
features_verified.percentage_discount: WORKING - Correctly calculates discount_amount as subtotal * percentage/100
features_verified.fixed_discount: WORKING - Correctly caps discount at subtotal (cannot exceed order total)
features_verified.split_payment_validation: WORKING - Returns 400 if cash+card doesn't match total
features_verified.discount_with_split_payment: WORKING - Discount applied first, then split payment on discounted total
features_verified.frontend_discount_panel: WORKING - Percentage/Fixed toggle, value input, reason input, Apply/Clear
features_verified.frontend_notes_panel: WORKING - Textarea for kitchen notes with Done/Clear
features_verified.frontend_split_payment_ui: WORKING - Cash/Card inputs with validation and Complete Split Payment button
